status.idle: Click to spin · drag to throw

picker.name: Spinning Wheel
picker.description: A click-to-spin / drag-to-flick wheel with momentum-based physics.

editor.name: Card title
editor.segments_helper: How many slices the wheel is divided into. 4 to 24.
editor.friction_helper: How quickly the wheel decelerates after a spin or release.
editor.labels_helper: Comma- or newline-separated. Up to one per segment; if you give fewer they cycle around the wheel (e.g. "A, B" on 8 segments → A B A B A B A B). Leave empty for 1..N.
editor.weights_helper: Comma-separated relative sizes (only the ratio matters). Same cycling rule as labels — "3, 1" on 4 segments produces big, small, big, small. Leave empty for equal slices.
editor.colors_helper: Comma- or newline-separated CSS colours (hex, rgb, hsl, named). Mapped to UNIQUE labels in order of first appearance — segments sharing a label always share a colour. Length up to `segments`; only the first N (= unique label count) are actually used. Leave empty for the built-in palette.
editor.label_colors_helper: Comma- or newline-separated CSS colours for the segment label text. Same unique-label mapping as Colors — only the first N (= unique label count) are used. Leave empty for dark grey on every segment.
editor.hub_text_helper: Text shown on the centre hub. Defaults to SPIN. Empty to hide.
editor.text_orientation_helper: How segment labels are oriented. Tangent (default) wraps the text around the rim; Radial rotates labels 90° clockwise so they read along the spoke from rim to centre.
editor.sound_helper: Play a peg-click sound on each segment crossing. Volume scales with wheel speed.
editor.footer_hint: Click the wheel for a random impulse spin, or click and drag to throw it — the angular velocity at release determines the spin. Friction decays the spin until it stops.

errors.segments_range: segments must be an integer between 4 and 24
errors.friction_value: friction must be one of: low, medium, high
errors.labels_type: labels must be an array of strings
errors.labels_length: labels length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.weights_type: weights must be an array of positive numbers
errors.weights_empty: weights must contain at least one entry
errors.weights_length: weights length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.colors_type: colors must be an array of non-empty strings
errors.colors_empty: colors must contain at least one entry
errors.colors_length: colors length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
errors.label_colors_type: label_colors must be an array of non-empty strings
errors.label_colors_empty: label_colors must contain at least one entry
errors.label_colors_length: label_colors length ({len}) must not exceed segments ({segments})
